chart.title: Seafood production: wild fish catch vs. aquaculture
chart.subtitle: Aquaculture means raising fish and other seafood — including molluscs, crustaceans and aquatic plants — in farms. Capture fishery production is how much wild fish is caught, whether for commercial, industrial, recreational, or subsistence use.
chart.citation: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO), via World Bank (2026)
